---
title: "'The More the Trials, the Stronger the Effect'.  Fact or Myth?  Evidence from Classical Experimental Psychology Paradigms"
subtitle: Supplementary Materials
toc: true
format:
    pdf: default
    html: default
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(latex2exp)
library(stringr)
library(patchwork)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 7.2,
  fig.height = 4.8,
  dpi = 300,
  out.width = "100%"
)

plot_base_size <- 11

plot_lwd <- 0.65
plot_lwd_strong <- 0.80
plot_lwd_ref <- 0.45

point_size <- 1.25
point_alpha <- 0.35
line_alpha <- 0.85
ribbon_alpha <- 0.22

common_theme <- function(base_size = plot_base_size) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      text = element_text(size = base_size),

      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 1),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1),

      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", color = NA),

      plot.title = element_text(
        face = "bold",
        size = base_size + 2,
        hjust = 0.5,
        margin = margin(b = 8)
      ),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(
        size = base_size,
        hjust = 0.5,
        margin = margin(b = 8)
      ),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = base_size - 2, hjust = 0),

      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      legend.position = "bottom",

      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.25),
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(1.1, "lines"),

      plot.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
    )
}

theme_set(common_theme())

update_geom_defaults("line", list(linewidth = plot_lwd, alpha = line_alpha))
update_geom_defaults("smooth", list(linewidth = plot_lwd_strong))
update_geom_defaults("point", list(size = point_size, alpha = point_alpha))
update_geom_defaults("ribbon", list(alpha = ribbon_alpha, colour = NA))
update_geom_defaults("boxplot", list(linewidth = plot_lwd_ref, outlier.size = 1.1))

geom_paper_line <- function(..., linewidth = plot_lwd_strong, alpha = line_alpha) {
  geom_line(..., linewidth = linewidth, alpha = alpha)
}

geom_paper_ribbon <- function(..., alpha = ribbon_alpha) {
  geom_ribbon(..., alpha = alpha, colour = NA)
}

geom_paper_hline <- function(yintercept = 0, ...) {
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = yintercept,
    linewidth = plot_lwd_ref,
    linetype = "dashed",
    ...
  )
}

geom_paper_point <- function(..., size = point_size, alpha = point_alpha) {
  geom_point(..., size = size, alpha = alpha)
}

task_labels <- c(
  simon = "Simon",
  snarc = "SNARC",
  tswitch = "Task-switching"
)

condition_labels <- function(task, congruence) {
  case_when(
    task == "tswitch" & congruence == "i" ~ "Switch",
    task == "tswitch" & congruence == "c" ~ "Non-switch",
    congruence == "i" ~ "Incongruent",
    congruence == "c" ~ "Congruent"
  )
}
```

```{r}
#| label: data
#| cache: true

res <- readRDS(here("objects", "task_cum_log.rds"))
res_plot <- select(res, task, trial, params_log, emmeans_log)
res_plot <- rename(res_plot, "params" = params_log, "emmeans" = emmeans_log)
```

\newpage

# Log-normal model

In this section we include the results of the same cumulative models presented in the main paper but using a log tranformations of the reaction times. We decided to present the raw reaction times to improve the intepretability of the model parameters, in particular the variance decomposition.

```{r}
term_titles <- list(
  "(Intercept)" = TeX("$\\beta_0$"),
  "congruence1" = TeX("$\\beta_1$"),
  "congruencei" = TeX("$\\beta_1$"),
  "sd__(Intercept)" = TeX("$\\sigma_P$"),
  "sd__congruence1" = TeX("$\\sigma_{P \\times C}$"),
  "sd__congruencei" = TeX("$\\sigma_{P \\times C}$"),
  "sd__Observation" = TeX("$\\sigma_E$"),
  "sigma" = TeX("$\\sigma_E$")
)

cum_plot <- function(data, x_limits = NULL, title = NULL) {
  data <- data |>
    mutate(
      conf.low = if_else(is.na(conf.low), estimate, conf.low),
      conf.high = if_else(is.na(conf.high), estimate, conf.high)
    )

  ggplot(data, aes(x = trial, y = estimate)) +
    geom_paper_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high)) +
    geom_paper_line() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = x_limits) +
    labs(title = title, x = "Cumulative trial", y = NULL)
}

emm_limits <- function(data) {
  lower_name <- intersect(c("asymp.LCL", "lower.CL", "conf.low"), names(data))[1]
  upper_name <- intersect(c("asymp.UCL", "upper.CL", "conf.high"), names(data))[1]
  list(lower = lower_name, upper = upper_name)
}

plot_cumulative_task <- function(data, task_id, task_title) {
  cum_dat <- data |>
    filter(task == task_id) |>
    unnest(params) |> 
    filter(!str_detect(term, "^cor__"))

  x_limits <- range(cum_dat$trial, na.rm = TRUE)

  emm_dat <- data |>
    filter(task == task_id) |>
    unnest(emmeans) |> 
    mutate(
      congruence = condition_labels(task, congruence),
      congruence = factor(
        congruence,
        levels = c("Congruent", "Incongruent", "Non-switch", "Switch")
      )
    ) |>
    filter(contrast != "c - i")

  ci_names <- emm_limits(emm_dat)

  p_emm <- ggplot(
    emm_dat,
    aes(x = trial, y = emmean, color = congruence, fill = congruence)
  ) +
    geom_paper_ribbon(
      aes(ymin = .data[[ci_names$lower]], ymax = .data[[ci_names$upper]]),
      alpha = ribbon_alpha
    ) +
    geom_paper_line() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = x_limits) +
    labs(title = NULL, x = "Cumulative trial", y = NULL) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.75), color = NA),
      legend.key = element_rect(fill = scales::alpha("white", 0.75), color = NA)
    )

  make_term_plot <- function(term_candidates) {
    term_present <- intersect(term_candidates, unique(cum_dat$term))[1]
    if (is.na(term_present)) {
      return(plot_spacer())
    }

    title <- term_titles[[term_present]]
    if (is.null(title)) title <- term_present

    cum_dat |>
      filter(term == term_present) |>
      cum_plot(x_limits = x_limits, title = title)
  }

  plot_list <- list(
    make_term_plot(c("(Intercept)")),
    make_term_plot(c("congruence1", "congruencei")),
    p_emm,
    make_term_plot(c("sd__(Intercept)")),
    make_term_plot(c("sd__congruence1", "sd__congruencei")),
    make_term_plot(c("sd__Observation", "sigma"))
  )

  wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 3) +
    plot_layout(axes = "collect", axis_titles = "collect") +
    plot_annotation(title = task_title)
}
```

```{r}
plot_cumulative_task(res_plot, "simon", "Simon")
```

```{r}
plot_cumulative_task(res_plot, "snarc", "SNARC")
```

```{r}
plot_cumulative_task(res_plot, "tswitch", "Task-switching")
```
